text: Today we are going to start NexGIS NexGIS is a framework of React which makes a lot of things easy In this video we are going to see what is NexGIS and why we have to use it Let's go to the computer screen Let's roll the intro Intro So what is NexGIS and why we have to use it NexGIS is a framework which is used to make big apps to make big projects What does big app mean? What do I mean by big projects? Like suppose I want to make a clone of Airbnb or I want to make a clone of OYO or I want to make a clone of let us say any website like Code with Harry or GitHub then a lot of things are happening in one app Like suppose I am making Netflix What are the things happening in Netflix My authentication is going on in Netflix All the content that I have put I have to keep it somewhere and fetch it from there Then I have to ensure what things are visible in which component Then I have to ensure that the page is not loaded by using React So all these things become easy through NexGIS because NexGIS gives you the functionality to make APIs that is, what you are getting in React but along with that you do not need to use a router because it has file-based routing What is it? I will tell you about it and NexGIS has SEO tools then there are different ways to render data We will read about all Don't be too confused Now what we will do is install NexGIS and to install NexGIS you have to run the command npx create next app at the latest and you can make a new NexGIS app Let me show you how this thing works See what we will do here First of all, we will open it in VS Code I opened it in VS Code So I will open the terminal here and I will paste this command here Now see I have pasted this command Now it will ask me what name do you want to keep for your app I will keep its name first because it is my first app Do you want to use TypeScript? I will say no Do you want to use ESLint? I will say yes Do you want to use Tailwind? I will say yes Do you want to use src directory? I will say no Do you want to use app router? Do you want to use import? I will say yes Now I will tell you what are all these things Do you want to customize import alias? No, now move forward with all these options Do what I have done If you are a beginner and your app has started to be made That is, your app is being made in the first folder and as soon as this app is made a lot of files are being generated and what do those files do? As we saw we used to make VTAP and by doing npm create vtap latest Similarly, we are making an app of nextjs in which we will write react but there will be some changes for good What is nextjs? I will tell you everything in this video Now see, it has been successful Your next project is made Now if you have not installed nodejs If you are watching this video directly for some reason then you must install nodejs Because everything is happening through nodejs npm etc. I hope that is obvious So let's close it Now I will open the first folder You can do this in two ways Either you close VS Code and open the first folder Open with code Go to the first folder Shift right click and open with code Otherwise, what can you do? I will tell you a command code-r and first So code-r will open the first folder So it will open here And it is open Now see what is given here One is the app directory Then we have public And all these files are made We have also given here You simply do npm run dev as you used to do earlier And as soon as you do npm run dev A development server will start for you On localhost 3000 And you see on localhost 3000 You have got an app And this is nextjs by versal And we do the same What we were doing in the vapp What we were doing in react What are those changes And why are those changes good Why are those changes so good That you will also say that making an app Is so easy in this So first of all we will understand the folder structure of nextjs Why are these folders given You see here There is an app directory in nextjs Nextjs can be done in two ways One is through the app directory And the other is through pages Whenever you go to the documentation of nextjs You will see using app router and using pages router We will use app router Because it is the latest Pages router is very old So in nextjs 12 there was only pages There was no app router But from nextjs 13 there is an app router And we will use app router only because it is the future So let me tell you this thing Now see what we have to do Suppose I want to see this page on my slash Which page should I see Whatever page.js we have here will be seen So here in page.js if I remove all this And here I write div And I write div here and I will React it to javascript JavaScript react React I have done it jsx So that I write div here and I get it like this I am home page I will do it And remove this too In fact I will remove everything And I will write div here And I will write I am home page So I wrote this And you see here I am home page Nothing new in that Here are some global styles because of which You can see this black color You can see here I am home page So you should know this thing I will do it again So that our dark mode is active I wrote I am home page So I am home page Now suppose I want to have an about page on slash about So what I will do In app directory I will make a folder named about I will make a page.js in it And here I will do rafce What I will do I will write I am about So when I will go to slash about So you see here I am about Will come this is our file Based routing means Whatever routes you want What do you do You make a folder of that Suppose I want a contact route I will make a contact folder I will make a file page.js And rafce I will make its name contact I will write I am contact Now what I will do I want to make components So I will make a component here And I will name it Navbar.js I will do rafce I will do navbar and I will import this navbar Where I will import this navbar I will import it Here is my about page And on my home page So I can do it like this But I can do one more thing You know what I can put it in my layout You see here This is the layout in which html is given Body is given and I want Just part of the body Navbar is mine So I will import navbar And navbar will come here And you see here Is being used. I will tell you about it But I am doing the same thing What we used to do in our vtap That is, I imported navbar And we used navbar here And you see, now whichever page I go I will get to see navbar there If I write here contact Then I will get to see navbar here Because I have put my whole app Navbar component in my whole app I have put navbar here I hope you are understanding this And I hope this thing is You have become completely clear Whenever we import anything in nextjs We use at the rate At the rate means the most Outside where our project is At the rate slash component means Go to the component folder in the most outer At the rate slash public Means go to the public folder So in this way you can also do at the rate slash app So you can do all these things here At the rate What is import alias basically If you want to do it on the outermost So what will happen with it You don't have to do all that And when you get a chance to make big projects In nextjs then you will know Its importance For now, you understand it like this We import like this Now if you write navbar, it will be automatically imported So that should not be a problem So what did we understand so far We understood that nextjs is like react But in this we get file based routing Which means whatever we have to make API routes or direct routes We about and contact This is how we make a folder In this we can make page.js And as we make page.js So whatever we put in it It will come on our slash about Slash contact will come and if we go only on slash Then this page.js will come So what do i do I come on this page I come on about, I am using tailwind here I will write h1. Here I will do jsx I will write here h1.text Excel And here I will write Problem solved By Nextjs Now I will go on slash about I will show you by backing Problem solved by nextjs And we can write here And we can write li The first thing I want to give This is This is full stack solution Second thing is Second thing is I am telling you Most important features I am telling you about them File based routing Then after this Along with file based routing It gives you additional Features Like next router In fact it is in next navigation I write like router from Next navigation What does it mean You will see in next videos But now you understand Additional features Like router from next navigation After this we get to see Optimized rendering What does it mean Nextjs gives you rendering solutions So if I write here Optimized rendering So you get to see Different types of rendering solutions About which we will discuss in the coming videos But pretty much About nextjs It makes things very easy It is fun to develop And nextjs has some features Like optimized rendering And making api's It is easy to configure middleware Now if you go to its documentation Everything is Written very easily And you There will be no problem in finding anything Now if you want to change this title Or you want to set its meta description You can come here in layout In layout.js You can change the title Which I want to block And I want to give its description I am a blog So what will happen by saying I am a blog Where will I see it See blog is seen here I will show you I am a blog Here it will be seen as meta tag So in the coming videos We will be exploring nextjs And you will see its features Now you can access the playlist of sigma Because I am going to tell you about nextjs in this And if you have not reviewed it yet Then you go to the first video And drop your review In which you will give 5 stars And tell me how did you like this course And should anyone take this free course That's all for now Thank you so much for watching this video And I will see you next time Outro Music
